task_completion.description: Open the fabrication drawing to read the required dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file viewer is open showing the contents of 'stiffener_fabrication_drawing.txt' with the required dimensions (130mm, 25mm, 30mm, 45mm, 100mm, 70mm).

task_completion.description: Open the initial stiffener profile in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application is open with the file 'stiffener_profile.slvs' loaded, displaying a 2D profile of the stiffener plate.

task_completion.description: Apply some of the required dimensional constraints to the profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace canvas or property browser shows at least one or two distance constraints (e.g., 130.00, 70.00) applied to the line segments of the profile.

task_completion.description: Apply all six required dimensional constraints to fully constrain the profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace canvas displays all six specific distance constraints (130.00, 25.00, 30.00, 45.00, 100.00, 70.00) attached to the profile's edges. The sketch may indicate it is 'ok' or fully constrained in the property browser.

task_completion.description: Save the fully constrained profile as the target file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'stiffener_constrained.slvs' in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory, or the SolveSpace window title updates to 'stiffener_constrained.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace graphical user interface to apply constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with SolveSpace's constraint tools (e.g., distance/length constraint tool) rather than editing the .slvs file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using SolveSpace rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using SolveSpace's 'File -> Save As' menu to create the new file, rather than using 'cp' or 'mv' in a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent applied the exact constraint values specified in the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimensions entered in SolveSpace exactly match the required set (130, 25, 30, 45, 100, 70) and were not arbitrarily guessed or copied from a different source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The fabrication drawing specifies exactly six dimensional constraints: 130mm (overall base length), 25mm (bottom ledge height), 30mm (ledge horizontal depth), 45mm (web height above ledge), 100mm (top edge length), and 70mm (total plate height). The agent must open '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stiffener_profile.slvs' in SolveSpace, apply these exact distance constraints to the sketch (tolerance 0.5mm), and save the result as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stiffener_constrained.slvs'.
